description: Curated API endpoint map for 6529.io. Distilled from the 6529 MCP server skill and backend source code. Not a replacement for the full OpenAPI spec (553KB in the repo) — this is a curated entry point for agents to discover what queries are possible and how to make them.

rate_limits.note: Authenticated requests may have higher limits. Check api.6529.io/docs for current limits.

oracle_note: The prenode oracle is a community-run data source for TDH and card data. It is separate from api.6529.io and has its own rate limits (~60 rapid requests before 429).

endpoints.what: Map any Ethereum wallet address to full 6529.io identity profile
endpoints.returns: id, handle, normalised_handle, cic, rep, tdh, tdh_rate, xtdh, xtdh_rate, level, display (ENS), primary_wallet, pfp, banner1, banner2, wallets[], classification, sub_classification, consolidation_key, is_wave_creator, profile_wave_id, artist_of_prevote_cards[], winner_main_stage_drop_ids
endpoints.agent_use_case: Look up someone's 6529 profile from their wallet address
pitfalls: Use 0.5s delay between bulk requests
Handle 429 with 10s backoff
Some fields like artist_of_prevote_cards can be stale — cross-reference with card-snapshot data

endpoints.what: Get identity profile by handle (e.g. punk6529)
endpoints.returns: Same fields as by-wallet endpoint
endpoints.agent_use_case: Look up someone's 6529 profile from their handle
pitfalls: Some old identity endpoints (e.g. /api/6529Profile/) return 404 — use /api/identities/ pattern

endpoints.what: Get profile data by identity key
endpoints.returns: Profile details including display info, wallet data, and profile-level metrics
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get detailed profile information beyond what identities endpoint returns

endpoints.what: Get a profile's wave ID and curation ID
endpoints.returns: {profile_wave_id, profile_curation_id}
endpoints.agent_use_case: Find someone's wave to audit their wave score
pitfalls: Returns null if the user hasn't created a wave

endpoints.what: Check if a handle is available
endpoints.returns: Availability status
endpoints.agent_use_case: Check handle availability before suggesting a profile name

endpoints.what: REP overview across the network
endpoints.returns: REP category overview data
endpoints.agent_use_case: Understand REP distribution across categories

endpoints.what: List all REP categories
endpoints.returns: Array of category objects with names and metadata
endpoints.agent_use_case: Discover what REP categories exist in the 6529 network

endpoints.what: Get REP ratings received by a profile
endpoints.returns: Array of ratings with rater, category, amount, timestamp
endpoints.agent_use_case: See who has given REP to a profile and in which categories
pitfalls: May require authentication or identity parameter

endpoints.what: Get REP ratings given by a profile
endpoints.returns: Array of ratings with recipient, category, amount, timestamp
endpoints.agent_use_case: See who a profile has given REP to
pitfalls: May require authentication or identity parameter

endpoints.what: Paginated list of ALL ecosystem wallets with identity and TDH data
endpoints.returns: count, data[] with handle, level, rep_score, cic_score, tdh, boosted_tdh, unboosted_tdh, balance, unique_memes, memes_cards_sets, consolidation_key, pfp_url, consolidation_display, day_change
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get the full TDH leaderboard or benchmark multiple wallets
pitfalls: ~17,934 wallets total
50-100 per page
Use 0.5s delay between page fetches

endpoints.what: Get per-NFT holder data with full identity
endpoints.returns: data[] with token_id, contract, balance, consolidation_key, tdh, boost, boosted_tdh, tdh_rank, handle, pfp_url, rep_score, cic_score, primary_wallet, xtdh, consolidation_display, total_balance, total_tdh, level
endpoints.agent_use_case: Find who holds a specific meme card or gradient, with their full identity
pitfalls: Meme contract: 0x33FD426905F149f8376e227d0C9D3340AaD17aF1
Gradient contract: 0x0c58ef43ff3032005e472cb5709f8908acb00205

endpoints.what: Per-season collection depth for a profile
endpoints.returns: boost, memes_balance, unique_memes, gradients_balance, nextgen_balance, seasons[] with per-season sets_held, partial_set_unique_cards_held, total_cards_held, total_cards_in_season
endpoints.agent_use_case: See how many season sets a collector has completed and their collection depth

endpoints.what: Per-card market data (price, volume, hodl rate, supply)
endpoints.returns: Array of card objects: mint_price, supply, floor_price, market_cap, total_volume, total_volume_last_24_hours, total_volume_last_7_days, total_volume_last_1_month, highest_offer, hodl_rate, mint_date
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get market data for all meme cards — volume, floor prices, hodl rates
pitfalls: 101 cards per page
6 pages for 512 cards
Mint price is 0.06529 ETH standard, 0 for free mints

endpoints.what: Per-card royalty and proceeds data
endpoints.returns: Array of {token_id, contract, name, artist, thumbnail, volume, proceeds, artist_split, artist_take}
endpoints.agent_use_case: See how much each card has generated in secondary volume and primary proceeds
pitfalls: collection_type='memes' works; others may not

endpoints.what: Per-holder purchase/sale/transfer history
endpoints.returns: data[] with primary_purchases_count/value, secondary_purchases_count/value, sales_count/value, transfers_in/out, airdrops, burns
endpoints.agent_use_case: Track a collector's full transaction history (buys, sells, transfers)
pitfalls: CRITICAL: Returns ALL wallets that interacted WITH the given consolidation_key, sorted by volume. The first entry is punk6529 (most active), NOT the queried holder. Search data[] for matching consolidation_key to find the holder's own activity.
Less active holders may need up to 5 pages
26K+ entries per holder — pagination is expensive

endpoints.what: Get wave data including score breakdown
endpoints.returns: Wave metadata, score components, penalties, safety multiplier, quality gate, visibility tier, wave REP, formula constants
endpoints.agent_use_case: Audit a wave's discovery score and understand why it's visible or demoted
pitfalls: Need the wave UUID, not the name — use wave search or profile wave endpoint to get it

endpoints.what: Get ranked PARTICIPATORY drops (art submissions) with full author profiles, ratings, media, and content
endpoints.returns: Array of ranked drops with rank, rating, top_raters, reactions, media URLs, author profiles, content
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get the actual art submissions and their rankings from a wave
pitfalls: Use /leaderboard for art submissions, NOT /drops (which returns CHAT messages only)
Art submissions have drop_type 'PARTICIPATORY'; chat messages have drop_type 'CHAT'

endpoints.what: Get CHAT drops (messages) from a wave's community feed
endpoints.returns: Array of chat message drops with content, author, reactions
endpoints.agent_use_case: Read the conversation in a wave's chat feed
pitfalls: Returns CHAT drops only, not PARTICIPATORY art submissions. Use /leaderboard for art.

endpoints.what: Get full content of a single drop by UUID
endpoints.returns: Full drop JSON: content, media, author, rank, rating, top_raters, reactions, is_signed, drop_type
endpoints.agent_use_case: Read the full content of a specific drop when you have its UUID

endpoints.what: Ecosystem-wide TDH totals
endpoints.returns: Total TDH, memes/gradients/nextgen breakdown, merkle root, block number
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get the current total TDH across the entire 6529 ecosystem
pitfalls: Oracle is community-run — may be temporarily unavailable

endpoints.what: TDH leaderboard above a threshold
endpoints.returns: Array of {consolidation_key, tdh, addresses[]}
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get all wallets above a TDH threshold for benchmarking
pitfalls: Returns ~244 entries for TDH > 1,000,000

endpoints.what: Full TDH breakdown for a wallet: memes, gradients, nextgen, per-season
endpoints.returns: memes_balance, memes[], gradients_balance, gradients[], nextgen_balance, nextgen[], block, merkle_root
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get detailed TDH breakdown showing which collections contribute to a wallet's TDH
pitfalls: gradients and gradients_balance are at TOP LEVEL of response, NOT nested under a 'breakdown' key
Oracle returns 429 after ~60 rapid requests — use 0.5-1s delay

endpoints.what: Single NFT metadata (TDH, mint_date, edition_size)
endpoints.returns: NFT metadata with TDH data
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get TDH and metadata for a specific meme card or gradient

endpoints.what: Card snapshot data for all meme cards
endpoints.returns: Array of card objects with TDH, rank, artist, season, supply, mint date
endpoints.agent_use_case: Get all meme card data in one request for local indexing
pitfalls: Large response — may be slow
Not auto-regenerated — check freshness

common_queries.question: What is someone's TDH?
see_also: For on-chain alternatives (direct Ethereum queries), see /on-chain-basics.json

common_queries.question: List all meme cards
common_queries.note: 101 cards per page, 6 pages for 512 cards. Each card has market data (volume, floor, hodl rate).
see_also: For on-chain alternatives (direct Ethereum queries), see /on-chain-basics.json

common_queries.question: Who holds a specific meme card?
common_queries.returns: Current holder's handle, level, REP, CIC, TDH, xTDH
see_also: For on-chain alternatives (direct Ethereum queries), see /on-chain-basics.json

common_queries.question: What is someone's wave score?
common_queries.note: Wave score includes 5 quality components, 4 penalties, safety multiplier, quality gate, and visibility tier.

common_queries.question: What art was submitted to a wave?
common_queries.note: Use /leaderboard NOT /drops. /drops returns chat messages only. /leaderboard returns PARTICIPATORY art submissions with rankings, ratings, and media.

common_queries.question: What are the total ecosystem TDH stats?
common_queries.alternative: GET /api/tdh/consolidated_metrics?page=1&pageSize=1 → count field gives total wallets

common_queries.question: How much volume has a card generated?
What seasons has someone collected?
common_queries.returns: Per-season sets_held, total_cards_held, total_cards_in_season — shows collection completeness

common_queries.question: What is someone's full transaction history?
common_queries.pitfall: Returns ALL wallets that interacted WITH the ckey, sorted by volume. Search data[] for matching consolidation_key to find the holder's OWN activity.

common_queries.question: Who are the top TDH holders?

contracts.note: Meme contract has 512+ tokens. Gradient contract has 101 tokens (minted Oct 2021).

source_code.route_files: Search for *.routes.ts in src/api-serverless/src/ to find all endpoints
